stories.headline: Pentagon Rolls Out $1.5T FY27 Budget — 44% Jump Hinged on Reconciliation Bill
stories.summary: Acting DOD Comptroller Jay Hurst unveiled a $1.5 trillion FY2027 spend plan, a 44% increase over current funding, with $350 billion of new money contingent on passing a partyline reconciliation bill.

stories.headline: Federal Appeals Court Strikes Down Trump Asylum Ban 2-1
stories.summary: A divided D.C. Circuit panel ruled Trump illegally ended asylum processing by declaring an immigrant 'invasion'; the administration vowed to appeal to the Supreme Court.

stories.headline: Treasury Sanctions Iran-Linked Shipping Network as Witkoff, Kushner Travel to Pakistan
stories.summary: The Treasury slapped sanctions on ships doing business with Iran (China-focused) as Witkoff and Kushner head to Pakistan to restart talks; Iran says no direct negotiations are scheduled.

stories.headline: Trump to Attend White House Correspondents' Dinner as Sitting President for First Time
stories.summary: Trump returns from a Mar-a-Lago crypto event to the Washington Hilton tonight, his first WHCD as president; he is expected to bring jokes after years of resisting the dinner.

stories.headline: Fitzpatrick Says He'd Leave GOP for Independent If PA Had Open Primaries
stories.summary: Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick (R-PA-01) told Punchbowl's Fly Out Day he '100%' would register as Independent under open primaries, calling the two-party system 'inherently divisive' and citing Washington's 1796 farewell address.

stories.headline: PA Sen. Dan Laughlin Pitches 'Draft' Plan for Drawing Congressional Districts
stories.summary: State Sen. Dan Laughlin (R-Erie) proposed an alternative to mid-cycle partisan redistricting after Texas, Florida, California and Virginia all redrew maps to favor their parties.

stories.headline: Philadelphia Council Adopts Nation's Most Aggressive ICE-Restriction Package
stories.summary: Philadelphia City Council on Thursday approved a high-profile legislative package restricting federal immigration enforcement, placing the city at the front of local resistance to Trump's deportation campaign.

stories.headline: Henry Hub Futures Fall 3.6% to $2.52/MMBtu — Lowest Since Oct 2024
stories.summary: U.S. natural gas futures dropped 3.6% Friday to $2.52/MMBtu as warmer-than-normal spring temperatures pushed working storage roughly 8% above the seasonal norm for the week ended April 24.

stories.headline: WTI Crude Settles at $94.40 — Down 1% on Iran-Pakistan Talks Optimism
stories.summary: WTI front-month fell more than 1% to $94.40 Friday as the White House confirmed Witkoff and Kushner would travel to Pakistan to restart Iran negotiations, easing the geopolitical risk premium.

stories.headline: NJ BPU's Guhl-Sadovy Lays Out Affordability Playbook as NJ Bills Climb 16.9%
stories.summary: BPU President Christine Guhl-Sadovy is pushing accelerated solar/storage procurement and structural cost-recovery reforms after NJ ratepayers absorbed a 16.9% YoY price increase — the steepest in the country.

stories.headline: Keller Faces Misiorowski Tonight as Pirates Try to Build on Skenes' One-Hitter
stories.summary: Mitch Keller (2-1, 2.79 ERA) gets the ball at Milwaukee tonight at 6:10 ET facing Jacob Misiorowski (1-2, 3.04); the Pirates (15-11) are coming off Skenes' 7 IP, 1 H, 7 K masterpiece Friday.
